title: FOIA Request Processing Governance
description: Governance configuration for the FOIA Request Processing Workflow. Enforces due process requirements for this rights-impacting workflow: 20-business-day response deadline, individualized withholding explanations with exemption citations, and appeal to an independent review panel.

reviewProtocols.description: Intake completeness review uses unassisted protocol — clerk independently checks completeness before assignment.
Exemption review requires independent first assessment followed by explicit consideration of disclosure before applying any withholding. Applied to all determination transitions.
Adverse decisions require independent first assessment and calibrated confidence to reduce over-withholding bias.
Appeal review uses dual-blind protocol to ensure independence from original determination. Independent first prevents anchoring on the original decision.

pipelines.description: Validates FOIA request completeness and required fields before assignment.

stages.description: Verify all required FOIA request fields are present and valid.

assertions.description: Request description must be present and non-empty.
Requester contact information must be present.

stages.description: Validate requester identity and contact information format.

pipelines.description: Validates records search results before exemption review.

stages.description: Verify records search covered all required repositories.

assertions.description: Search results must be traceable to specific records systems queried.

pipelines.description: Validates adverse decision notice quality before issuance.

stages.description: Every withheld record segment must have an itemized exemption citation.

assertions.description: All exemptions applied must have corresponding withholding justification text.
Exemption citations must reference statutory text and specific record segments.

stages.description: Adverse decision notice must contain complete appeal instructions.

assertions.description: Notice must include appeal deadline, review panel contact, and filing instructions.

stages.description: Supervisor reviews adverse decision notice before issuance.

taskCatalog.description: Verify FOIA request contains all required fields. Fully verifiable by re-checking field presence and format.
Search government records systems for responsive records. Partially verifiable by auditing search query logs and repository coverage.
Review responsive records against FOIA exemption categories. Partially verifiable — exemption applicability requires legal judgment but citation can be source-grounded.
Prepare adverse decision notice with itemized exemption citations and appeal instructions. Verifiable by checking required sections are present.
Independent panel review of appeal. Partially verifiable — panel reasoning can be source-grounded to record evidence but ultimate determination requires legal judgment.
Send notice that no responsive records were found. Verifiable by confirming records search was complete and notice was transmitted.
